meaning: n.缅因州(美国东北角的州)
examples: You take a chance on the weather if you holiday in Maine.
Mark Johnston was running unopposed for mayor in Saco, Maine.
A forest fire is sweeping across portions of north Maine this evening.
Oysters grown in pristine northern waters, say Maine or Washington, have extremely low incidence of bacteria.
Jackson, nestled in the scenic town of Bar Harbor, Maine, is in the mouse business.
